## Throwing Fantastic Parties for Kids

Celebrating birthdays and gathering friends together has never been easier.

[Plan a Party](https://kidsparty.sites.motocms.com/contacts)

![Illustration](https://kidsparty.sites.motocms.com/res/61e53c92727fed0022f9bc37/61f013b898d6390022e20134_optimized_1063.webp)

About Perfect Kids

![Illustration](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

We've already done more than 340 #perfectkidsparties. Our main clients are kids and we know how to make them happy.

The company was founded by three moms of little boys and girls aimed to share their experience of throwing parties and make parents lives easier.Alice, Robin, and Lucy, three founders of the company, had quite a journey planning parties for their children and faced all the possible complications and challenges.

It was not an easy task, so in the end, they had to figure out the easiest way for parents to relax while kids are having fun and developed their own methods of planning, organizing, and carrying out an original party.

[Contact Us](https://kidsparty.sites.motocms.com/contacts) [Learn More](https://kidsparty.sites.motocms.com/about)

All Kinds of Parties for Any Taste and Occasion

![Illustration](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

Every party is special for your children and their friends.

![Illustration](https://kidsparty.sites.motocms.com/res/61e53c92727fed0022f9bc37/61eeb9e67286c50022153c84_optimized_1200_c1200x800-0x0.webp)

Group Events

A class, scout troop or your child wants to invite all the friends? It doesn't matter how many because everyone will have the best time possible.

## Our Packages

![Illustration](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

Here's a short description of the available packages.

![Heading photo](https://kidsparty.sites.motocms.com/res/61e53c92727fed0022f9bc37/61eebafa79747f00240dd2a0_optimized_1560_c1560x937-0x0.webp)

Back to Classics

Classics are proven with time and generations and never get old, no matter how much smartphones and social media conquer kids' minds. Amazing music, designed themes, and active games have been the main ingredients of a fun party for many centuries and generations.

[Learn More](https://kidsparty.sites.motocms.com/single-service)

![Heading photo](https://kidsparty.sites.motocms.com/res/61e53c92727fed0022f9bc37/61eec2b625221a0023aee933_optimized_1400_c1333x924-0x47.webp)

Deluxe Party

Deluxe Party is a great option for those who do not settle for less. If you want to go all the way in for your kid's holiday, that's exactly the option for you. Your kid's favorite heroes, rare themes, and multi-level quests and games – and it's not even a full list yet.

[Learn More](https://kidsparty.sites.motocms.com/single-service)

![Heading photo](https://kidsparty.sites.motocms.com/res/61e53c92727fed0022f9bc37/61eebd088393020022448386_optimized_1400_c1400x913-0x0.webp)

Ultimate Party

Ultimate Party is the fullest package offering the widest range of activities, food options, and even celebrity-invitation packages. Moreover, it also means having bonus options for events for parents. Instead of just chilling and watching your kids having fun, you can have fun too.

[Learn More](https://kidsparty.sites.motocms.com/single-service)

Testimonials

![Illustration](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

We're so glad that many families choose Perfect Kids for their special events!

![Illustration](https://kidsparty.sites.motocms.com/res/61e53c92727fed0022f9bc37/61eec3d857897f00243ae399_optimized.webp)

Michael, father of Jimmy Daniels

As a father of four kids, I can tell for sure that party planning is not an easy task to do. With this in mind, me and my wife made a decision to outsource all the planning and organization. Truth be told, we were worried whether it's going to fit into our budget and meet all the expectations at the end. Well, it truly did. The team of Perfect Kids definitely loves their job and kids as well.

December 15, 2024

![Illustration](https://kidsparty.sites.motocms.com/res/61e53c92727fed0022f9bc37/61eec351050d3300221b9e1f_optimized.webp)

Samantha, mother of Julia Williams

How do you guys even come up with all these programs? My daughter's party was such a BLAST. She's a huge fan of Minecraft, so we decided to dedicate the party exactly to that. Not only did the event managers perfectly understood our kid's interest (definitely better than we could do it), but they also ensured safety of the kids during all the quests and activities.

October 28, 2024

James, father of Max Dowson

My son wanted to celebrate his birthday with his school friends and who are we to refuse him? Perfect Kids did everything really perfectly; the boys had a lot of fun. There were a lot of active games and prizes, and a very cool surprise! When we put Max to bed in the evening, he said that it was the best birthday of his life. What more could happy parents want?

January 21, 2024

FAQ

![Illustration](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

You may find an answer to your question here.

- ### Are parties the same for different clients?













### No, each event is unique, and even if the basic concept is sometimes alike, it does not mean the party was done with a template. We understand that each parent wants the kid to have a one-in-a-kind day and not simply a copy of someone else's ideas. For this reason, all our events are entirely unique – from themes color to the smallest program details. This also includes different music and food.    If we offer you the previously made parties for the reference during the consult, it doesn't mean your party will look like that. Even if you specifically order the same party, it will not be an absolute copy. Each party is unique by definition.

- ### What payment options do you provide for clients?













### We can send you the requisites of all payment systems that we accept, and you'll let us know what works best for you. Usually, we prefer Card-to-Card transfers and PayPal transactions. We also use Payoneer but rather as an exception than as a rule. And no, we do not accept crypto payments.    Another preferable option is cash during the face-to-face meeting. You can bring cash with you on the first consult so you can make the payment right after our meeting, without having to come to the office on another day.

- ### Do you have a money back guarantee?













### No, but we have a 'Refuse a Service' option, and here is how it works. If, during some of the beginning stages of preparation, you see that the service does not satisfy your expectations, you can terminate the contract and not pay the final amount of money. Since we sign a service contract for all the events, the conditions such as the amounts of money and payment dates are specified in the signed documents. Therefore, we advise to read the contract carefully and pay specific attention to the paragraph that describes the mentioned data.

- ### Is it possible to change my party plan?













### Yes, sure. We go through the budget options during our first consult and discuss the packages in detail. However, if your expectations or budgetary conditions change during the process of preparing, you can always notify your manager and change the package. After you've done that, we'll have another consultation to discuss the changes in the process of preparation.    Note, however, that such change is only possible at the beginning stages of the preparations (those will be defined by your contract and vary for each event), so before requesting a change of the package, make sure your appeal complies with the contract conditions.

- ### Can I get a video consultation with your specialist?













### Of course, you can. Our team provides free consultations both in our office and online. You only need to fill out the contact form on our website, and our manager will get back to you immediately. We'll have a call any time during work hours.
